shared_properties: The student duelist keeps the 120x180 px body proportion, academy coat silhouette, and three-quarter lower-lane facing direction from the idle loop.
Core palette metadata remains primary #5C3317, background #2B1B17, and accent #D4AF37 while the reaction ring adds cyan only inside specs.colors_hex.
The wand hand, face, and shoulder trim stay readable with the same 2 px outline treatment used by the idle pose.
differences: Four frames push the lead foot forward, raise the off-hand card, and bend the knees to signal an imminent counter timing window.
A cyan anticipation ring appears around the wand tip and sweeps toward the lane marker.
Cape motion tightens and the head angle turns slightly upward so the player reads as tracking the incoming spell.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the duel loop, projectile attributes, UI layout, and Bevy runtime constraints for Reflect Academy.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the warm academy hall mood, layered duel composition, and luminous spell contrast.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the student duelist silhouette, costume trim, wand handling, and heroic stance.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load player_duelist_reflect_ready.png and build a 2x2 TextureAtlasLayout that activates when the projectile enters the outer timing window.
runtime_notes: Play at 10 FPS only while the duel state machine is in ReflectReady.
Swap from the idle atlas without moving the world anchor so collision and timing logic remain stable.
Fade the cyan ring with additive material or a companion FX sprite only if the engine setup supports it; the authored pixels must remain readable without post effects.

context.usage: Displayed while the projectile approaches the precision timing zone and the player can commit a reflect card.

readability_notes: The anticipation ring must remain outside the torso silhouette.
The lead foot shifts forward by at most 18 px relative to the idle anchor.
Card edge highlights must stay visible against the dark podium.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas canvas is exactly 280x380 px for four 140x190 frames with no inter-frame padding.
The cyan timing ring never obscures the face or hand silhouette in any frame.
The ready stance reads as a distinct escalation from idle when previewed in sequence at 10 FPS.
